subject: Tien Xuan Phan
summary: 55-year-old Vietnamese citizen died Jul 19, 2025 at Texas hospital after catastrophic brain bleed while detained at Karnes County facility. 47 days in custody. Jul 18, 5:25 AM: nurse found him UNRESPONSIVE, VOMITING, SEIZURES. Rushed to Otto Kaiser Hospital, then AIRLIFTED to Methodist Hospital Northeast. Critical condition: intubated, ventilated, SEVERE BRAIN BLEED. Died 5:48 PM Jul 19. Cause: under investigation 6+ months later. SEVERE INFORMATION GAP: No data on medical history, what caused brain bleed (trauma? hypertension?), any warning signs. 9th-10th ICE death 2025, 2nd Vietnamese death (after Nhon Ngoc Nguyen). Vietnamese American Organization condemns 'medical neglect, overcrowding, systemic abuse.' Petition for independent investigation.

key_findings.facility: Karnes County Immigration Processing Center, Texas → Methodist Hospital Northeast, Live Oak, TX
critical_failures: Jul 18, 5:25 AM: Found unresponsive, vomiting, seizure activity
SEVERE INFORMATION GAP: No data on medical history or cause of brain bleed
key_findings.medical_emergency: Seizures, vomiting, unresponsiveness → severe brain bleed → critical condition → death
key_findings.pattern: Sudden catastrophic neurological event, rapid deterioration, death. Cause unknown (traumatic vs. medical)
key_findings.death_circumstances: Found 5:25 AM with seizures, vomiting, unresponsive. Otto Kaiser Hospital → airlifted to Methodist Hospital Northeast. Severe brain bleed, intubated, ventilated, critical. Died 5:48 PM Jul 19.
key_findings.vietnamese_community_impact: 2nd Vietnamese death in ICE custody in 2025 (after Nhon Ngoc Nguyen). Vietnamese American Organization: 'sons, fathers, war survivors' - demand independent investigation.
key_findings.advocacy_response: Vietnamese American Organization (VAO) condemns ICE for 'medical neglect, overcrowding, systemic abuse.' Freedom for Immigrants: 'deadly medical neglect.' Petition for justice and independent investigation.
key_findings.investigation_status: Cause of death under investigation 6+ months. DHS OIG and ICE OPR investigating. Medical Examiner report not released.
key_findings.immigration_status: Removal order Apr 2, 2012. Failed to depart U.S. (13 years). Arrested Jun 2, 2025.
key_findings.information_gaps: SEVERE: No medical history, no intake screening results, no events before Jul 18, no cause of brain bleed (trauma? hypertension? aneurysm?), no autopsy findings. Cannot assess medical neglect without this data.
key_findings.possible_causes: Brain bleed causes: (1) Trauma/head injury (missed or ignored), (2) Hypertension (unscreened/untreated), (3) Aneurysm rupture (unpredictable). No evidence for any - awaiting autopsy.
